domain: Olive press multi-stage fractionation extraction — same source pressed multiple times under different conditions to extract different physical/chemical fractions.
specific_mechanism: Sequential mechanical/centrifugal extraction with stage-specific temperature, pressure, time produces fractions of different quality and composition from same input.
llm_application: PRESS-TUNE: multi-stage progressive fine-tuning where each stage uses different optimizer + data + temperature to extract a different capability 'fraction'. Stage 1: cold low-loss SFT on curated data extracts safe-preferred response. Stage 2: higher-temperature DPO on diverse data extracts diversity. Stage 3: low-rank adapter on raw web extracts open-ended generation. The base model is the 'paste'; each stage extracts a different capability.
novelty_claim: GLPFT global-to-local, sequential FT, CPT→SFT→RLHF→merge pipelines all use multi-stage progressive FT. PRESS-TUNE re-frames this as capability fractionation but the underlying mechanism is mainstream.
